directions.reason: lowered eyes and tucked chin clearly read down
both downward and leftward axes are clear
stronger left turn retains the lowered gaze
nose, face, and visible eye unmistakably point screen-left
remains screen-left while the gaze begins rising
near-frontal pose retains a subtle leftward bias with clear upward eyes
slight leftward head and eye bias smoothly approaches frontal up

continuity.reason: ordered loop has stable center and scale with no visible snap, reversal, clipping, or scale pop

alpha_holes.reason: reported rows are ear, hair, skirt, sleeve, and leg negative space rather than filled-body perforations
